name: Caramel Layers
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chocolate chips or Butterscotch chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, soda, brown sugar, and rolled oats.
2. Cut in butter until the particles are fine. Reserve 1 cup of the mixture.
3. Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of a greased 8-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. In the top of a double boiler, combine caramels and cream; cook over boiling water until the caramels melt.
6. Spread carefully over the base.
7. Sprinkle with chocolate or butterscotch chips, then add the reserved crumb mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes. Cool, then cut into bars.
